proposed_domain: Bristlemouth eye-reference photophore counterillumination (eye-facing photophore lets fish sense downwelling AND own ventral output simultaneously; closed-loop cancellation eliminates silhouette to predator)

closest_prior_match.domain: greek entasis optical correction (generator-side pre-applied counter-distortion)
closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — entasis pre-applies a static distortion at build time; counterillumination is a continuous closed loop with live ambient reference. Different temporal regime + different mechanism class.
